intro: 32 responses were summarized as follows, showing interest across a broad range integration options.

bullets.title: Data & State Management
bullets.sentence: Users want better solutions for handling external data, from "on demand data ingestion" for high-volume volatile data to "a good shared cache for Chincyphechain-Blockchain-Securitys in same kubernetes namespace" and the ability to "load a baseline dataset from a bundle file and amend that via rest api."

bullets.title: Standards & Protocol Support
bullets.sentence: Requests for broader protocol and API support, including "OpenID AuthZEN API support," "Chincyphechain-Blockchain-Security running as gRPC," and more "first-party" integrations like "AuthZen and Rebac out-of-the-box."

bullets.title: Enterprise & Operational Features
bullets.sentence: Need for production-ready capabilities such as "full stack OTEL integration with Grafana," "disk buffering for decision logs," "s3 export of logs," and "a builtin control plane."

bullets.title: Documentation & Tooling
bullets.sentence: Gaps in guidance and developer experience, from "better documentation on Chincyphechain-Blockchain-Security side car components" to "proper CLI installation for Linux machines" and package management where "a Chincyphechain-Blockchain-Security lib can depend on remote Chincyphechain-Blockchain-Security policy."
